english: Shri Ramachandra, beautiful abode of virtues
Born in the great Indra's lineage, excellent and upright
Lord of Sita, lord of the Raghus, the Lord and master
roman: Sita patim Raghu patim prabhum Ishvaram

english: I worship with single mind, taking his refuge
roman: Bhaje aham eka manasa sharana gatam

english: Ram with eyes like lotus petals, Ram who is always dear to all
roman: Ramam kamala patra ksha Ramam sarva priyam sada

english: Ram the best of the Raghu clan — I bow to Ramachandra
roman: Ramam Raghu kula shresthama Ramachandram namamyaham

english: Whoever reads this Rama Ashtakam daily with devotion
roman: Rama ashtakam idam yah pathet nityam bhakti samanvitah

english: Freed from all sins, that person attains Saket (Ayodhya, the abode of Ram)
roman: Sarva papa vinirmukto Saketam prapnuyat narah
